mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE status = 1 AND (role_keys IS NULL OR role_keys = '') ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (menu_name, path, component, icon, parent_id, order_num, role_keys, status, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{menuName}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{roleKeys}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET menu_name = #{menuName}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, parent_id = #{parentId}, order_num = #{orderNum}, role_keys = #{roleKeys}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
